chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – The Penalty (Hadd) regarding the sodomy

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) رَجُلٌ أَتَى رَجُلًا قَالَ عَلَيْهِ إِنْ كَانَ مُحْصَناً الْقَتْلُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يَكُنْ مُحْصَناً فَعَلَيْهِ الْحَدُّ قَالَ قُلْتُ فَمَا عَلَى الْمُؤْتَى قَالَ عَلَيْهِ الْقَتْلُ عَلَى كُلِّ حَالٍ مُحْصَناً كَانَ أَوْ غَيْرَ مُحْصَنٍ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moala Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Hammad Bin Usman who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘A man comes to a man’. Heasws said: ‘Upon him, if he was married, is the killing, and if does not happen to be married, so upon him would be the Penalty (Hadd)’. I said, ‘So what is upon the passive one?’ Heasws said: ‘Upon him is the killing, upon every state, be he married or without a marriage’.
